form.label: Pi-hole Clients
form.description: Client behavior, blocking rates, domain diversity, and query-volume anomalies.

search.query: | stats count as queries count(eval(action="blocked")) as blocked count(eval(reply_code="NXDOMAIN")) as nxdomain dc(query) as unique_domains dc(query_type) as query_types avg(eval(if(reply_time_ms>=0,reply_time_ms,null()))) as avg_reply_ms max(_time) as last_seen values(src_name) as names by pihole_node src | eval block_rate=round(100*blocked/queries,2),avg_reply_ms=round(avg_reply_ms,2) | convert ctime(last_seen) | sort - queries
| timechart span=5m count by action useother=f
| stats count by query_type | sort - count | head 15
| stats count as queries count(eval(action="blocked")) as blocked values(status) as status by query | eval block_rate=round(100*blocked/queries,2) | sort - queries | head 50

table.title: Top blocked domains for selected client

search.query: | search action=blocked | stats count as blocks values(status) as block_reason values(list_id) as list_id by query | sort - blocks | head 50

chart.title: Five-minute volume anomaly score by client

search.query: `pihole_queries` pihole_node="$node$" | bin _time span=5m | stats count as queries by _time src | eventstats avg(queries) as baseline stdev(queries) as deviation by src | eval zscore=round(if(deviation>0,(queries-baseline)/deviation,0),2) | where zscore>=2 | timechart span=5m max(zscore) by src limit=10
